papers.authors: Ishani Karmarkar, Liam O'Carroll, Aaron Sidford
papers.evidence: 计算二分类的最大间隔分离超平面（决策边界）
papers.tldr: 针对大规模二分类中计算最大边距分离超平面问题，现有确定性算法已接近最优查询复杂度，但顺序运行时间和并行深度仍可改进。本文提出两种随机算法，仅需Ō(γ^{-2/3})次矩阵向量查询，在保持查询效率的同时，显著降低顺序时间并提升并行度。算法一顺序时间Ō(γ^{-2/3} nnz(Φ) + γ^{-2(ω+1)/3})，并行深度Ō(γ^{-2/3})；算法二顺序时间Ō(γ^{-2/3} nnz(Φ) + γ^{-2})，并行深度Ō(γ^{-4/3})。该工作首次实现查询、时间与并行深度联合优化，为大规模高效分类提供了新方案。
papers.abstract_en: We study the fundamental classification problem of computing a separating hyperplane for a binary-labeled dataset of size $n$ with normalized $d$-dimensional features. Letting $Φ\in \mathbb{R}^{n \times d}$ denote the feature matrix and $γ$ the margin of the maximum-margin separating hyperplane, we present a randomized algorithm that solves this problem in $\tilde{O}(γ^{-2/3}\, \operatorname{nnz}(Φ) + γ^{-2(ω+1)/3})$-sequential running time (work), $\tilde{O}(γ^{-2/3})$-parallel (computational) depth, and accesses $Φ$ only through $\tilde{O}(γ^{-2/3})$-matrix-vector queries (matvecs). We also present a second, faster randomized algorithm with a $\tilde{O}(γ^{-2/3}\, \operatorname{nnz}(Φ) + γ^{-2})$-sequential running time that uses $\tilde{O}(γ^{-2/3})$-matvecs to $Φ$, but achieves only $\tilde{O}(γ^{-4/3})$-parallel depth. Both algorithms match the near-optimal deterministic matvec complexity recently established by Kornowski and Shamir [2025], Karmarkar et al. [2026] and achieve improved sequential runtime and parallel depth, albeit at the expense of using randomness.

papers.title_en: A Short Proof of Optimal Regularity for minimizers of the Alt-Phillips Problem
papers.evidence: Alt-Phillips自由边界问题涉及优化自由边界
papers.tldr: 对于Alt-Phillips自由边界问题，极小元的最优正则性一直是研究焦点，但传统证明通常较复杂。本文利用源自[DS20]的二分法论证，为γ∈(0,1)情形构建了一个自包含的简短证明。关键结果是建立了极小元在全区域的最优正则性估计。这一工作提供了一个清晰简洁的证明范式，显著简化了该问题的理解，并便于进一步推广与应用。
papers.abstract_en: We give a self-contained short proof of optimal regularity for minimizers of the Alt-Phillips Free Boundary Problem for $γ\in (0, 1)$. We adopt a dichotomy argument that originates from [DS20].

papers.title_en: Generalized Hyperbolic Conical Circle Packings associated with Finite Polygonal Decompositions of Surfaces with Boundary
papers.authors: Guangming Hu, Jun Hu, Lishan Li, Yi Qi
papers.evidence: 求解带边界曲面上的圆填充边值问题，并使用Thurston算法进行优化。
papers.tldr: 本文研究带边界曲面上基于多边形分解的广义双曲锥形圆填充。通过指定内外顶点测地曲率作为边值，证明了唯一解的存在性。利用Thurston迭代算法可从任意初始填充逼近此解，并建立了离散Schwarz-Pick引理，为离散共形几何提供了新工具。
papers.abstract_en: Let S be a compact topological surface with finitely many genus and finitely many holes and let D be a polygonal decomposition of S. In this paper, we consider the generalized hyperbolic conical circle packings associated with D. We first show that the boundary value problem has a unique solution k by prescribing total geodesic curvatures of generalized hyperbolic conical circles centered at interior vertices and geodesic curvatures of generalized hyperbolic conical circles centered at boundary vertices.   Then we show that such a solution k can be obtained by taking a limit of the packings inductively modified by Thurston's algorithm via an arbitrarily chosen initial generalized hyperbolic conical circle packing associated with D and with given boundary values. Thirdly, we develop the so-called discrete Schwarz-Pick lemma for the solution packing k on D.

papers.title_en: GRE-Diff: Gaussian Room Embeddings for Structured Layout Diffusion
papers.authors: Jing Wang, Haoran Xiong, Zihao Yan, Minglun Gong, Hui Huang
papers.evidence: 户型平面生成通过调整房间边界进行设计优化
papers.tldr: 针对公寓平面图设计，房间布局组合空间庞大，纯人工探索效率低且难以平衡功能与美观。GRE-Diff提出高斯房间嵌入（GRE），将每个房间建模为连续空间中的高斯分布，捕获其位置与范围，并以此驱动条件扩散模型，支持用户通过LLM指令或GUI交互实时指定房间类型、数量、边界形状等约束。高斯表征使房间几何连续可微，扩散生成能保持布局结构一致性。该框架首次将空间高斯分布融入扩散模型，实现了房间的连续表示与可控编辑。在RPLAN数据集上，该方法生成多样化、结构合理且满足约束的多边形平面图，实验显示其高质量与可编辑性，有效弥合了AI自动化与人类创造力的差距，为交互式空间设计提供了实用方案。
papers.abstract_en: Designing functional and aesthetically coherent floor plans requires exploring a vast space of possible room arrangements, a task that quickly becomes overwhelming for human designers. In this paper, we propose GRE-Diff, a controllable and interactive diffusion-based framework that automates the creation and editing of apartment floor plans under user-specified constraints.   By combining AI-generated suggestions with real-time, human-in-the-loop editing, the system enables users to specify room types, room counts, boundary shapes, and editing operations through LLM-parsed instructions or GUI-based interaction.   It then generates a diverse set of plausible and well-structured designs for refinement.   At the core of our approach is Gaussian Room Embedding (GRE), a continuous latent representation that models each room as a spatial Gaussian distribution capturing its location and extent.   Extensive experiments on the RPLAN dataset show that GRE-Diff produces high-quality, constraint-aware, and editable polygonal layouts, offering a practical step toward bridging AI-driven automation and human creativity in spatial design.

papers.authors: Madhumita Kundu, Daniel Lokshtanov, Soumi Nandi, Saket Saurabh, Kushal Singanporia
papers.evidence: 研究点必须位于矩形边界上的边界覆盖问题，优化选择矩形以满足边界约束。
papers.tldr: 几何边界覆盖问题要求每个点都落在矩形边界上。本文研究轴平行矩形的离散和连续两种设定。离散设定中矩形必须选自给定集合，我们证明该判定问题是W[1]-难的；连续设定中矩形可任意放置，通过结构分析将问题归约为组合集合覆盖，得到运行时间2^{O(k log k)}·n^{O(1)}的固定参数算法，并利用L形覆盖的NP完全性证明连续版也是NP完全的。这些结果揭示了不同设定下计算复杂性的显著差异。
papers.abstract_en: Geometric covering problems ask for a small family of geometric objects whose union covers a given point set. We study the more restrictive \emph{boundary covering} variant, where every point must lie on the boundary of a chosen object. Motivated by the framework of Langerman and Morin\,[Discret.\ Comput.\ Geom., 2005] for hyperspheres, we initiate the study of boundary covering by axis-parallel rectangles.   We first consider the \emph{discrete} setting, where rectangles must be selected from a given family. We define \bcdaprfull\ (\bcdaprshort): given a point set \(P\subseteq\mathbb{R}^2\), a family \(\mathcal{R}\) of axis-parallel rectangles, and an integer \(k\), decide whether \(P\) can be covered by the boundaries of at most \(k\) rectangles from \(\mathcal{R}\). We prove that \bcdaprshort\ is \(\mathrm{W}[1]\)-hard parameterized by \(k\).   We then study the \emph{continuous} variant, \prbcfull\ (\prbcshort), where rectangles may be placed freely. Given \(P\subseteq\mathbb{R}^2\) and \(k\), the goal is to decide whether \(P\) can be covered by the boundaries of at most \(k\) axis-parallel rectangles. In contrast to the discrete case, we show that \prbcshort\ is fixed-parameter tractable, with running time \(2^{\cO(k\log k)}\cdot n^{\cO(1)}\), where \(n=|P|\). Our algorithm relies on a structural analysis of how \(k\) rectangles interact with the point set, reducing \prbcshort\ to at most \(2^{\cO(k\log k)}\) instances of \ddmtcsp, each solvable in polynomial time. On the hardness side, we prove NP-completeness for boundary covering by axis-aligned \(L\)-shapes and use this reduction to establish NP-completeness of \prbcshort.

papers.title_en: Tubular Neighbourhoods of Pfaffian Sets and Applications to Neural Networks
papers.evidence: 推导神经网络决策边界管状邻域的界，有助于决策边界优化。
papers.tldr: 针对神经网络决策边界几何分析，本文将代数簇管状邻域体积界推广至光滑Pfaffian超曲面，给出了与定义函数Pfaffian格式相关的显式界。应用该界，导出了Pfaffian激活网络鲁棒性条件数的分布尾部估计，并在单隐层sigmoid有理权重网络中得到多项式宽度界。这一工作为分析非代数激活函数的神经网络提供了新几何工具。
papers.abstract_en: We derive bounds for the volume of tubular neighbourhoods of smooth Pfaffian hypersurfaces, generalising known results for algebraic varieties. The bounds are given in terms of the Pfaffian format of the defining functions. As an application, we obtain tail bounds on the probability distribution of a condition number measuring the robustness of neural network classifiers with Pfaffian activation functions, in both the uniform and Gaussian settings. In the special case of single-hidden-layer sigmoid networks with rational weights, we derive polynomial-in-width bounds for tubular neighbourhoods of the decision boundary.
